requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and IEC 61000 EMC Requirements

summary.en: Togo does not have a confirmed national charge-point management platform equivalent to Qatar's Tarsheed as of 2026-06-14. For any networked charger deployed by a fleet, hotel, charge-point operator, donor-funded project, or public site, OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1 is the practical interoperability baseline for remote monitoring, authorization, billing, diagnostics, and load management. EMC evidence should be based on the IEC 61000 series for harmonic emissions, flicker, surge, electrostatic discharge, radiated and conducted immunity, and power-frequency disturbances. Chargers with cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering functions may need additional radio and EMC evidence under the project or import conformity route.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未确认多哥存在与卡塔尔Tarsheed相当的全国性充电点管理平台。对于由车队、酒店、充电点运营商、捐助方资助项目或公共场址部署的任何联网充电桩，OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1是远程监控、授权、计费、诊断和负载管理的实际互操作基线。EMC证据应以IEC 61000系列为基础，覆盖谐波发射、闪变、浪涌、静电放电、辐射和传导抗扰度以及工频扰动。具有蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量功能的充电桩，可能需要根据项目或进口合格评定路径提供额外无线电和EMC证据。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未確認多哥存在與卡塔爾Tarsheed相當的全國性充電點管理平台。對於由車隊、酒店、充電點運營商、捐助方資助項目或公共場址部署的任何聯網充電樁，OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1是遠程監控、授權、計費、診斷和負載管理的實際互操作基線。EMC證據應以IEC 61000系列為基礎，覆蓋諧波發射、閃變、浪涌、靜電放電、輻射和傳導抗擾度以及工頻擾動。具有蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量功能的充電樁，可能需要根據項目或進口合格評定路徑提供額外無線電和EMC證據。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) 1.6 / 2.0.1 — back-office communication for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
IEC 61000-4 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques
CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 — emission evidence for chargers with multimedia, wireless, or smart functions

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system. GB/T 27930 is not an OCPP back-office protocol and is not interoperable with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack. China EMC reports based on GB 17625 and GB/T 17626 series may be structurally related to IEC 61000, but project reviewers may require IEC-numbered reports or a clause-level equivalence mapping.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间的通信。GB/T 27930不是OCPP后台协议，也不与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈互操作。基于GB 17625和GB/T 17626系列的中国EMC报告可能与IEC 61000在结构上相关，但项目审查方可能要求IEC编号报告或逐条等效映射。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間的通訊。GB/T 27930不是OCPP後台協議，也不與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧互操作。基於GB 17625和GB/T 17626系列的中國EMC報告可能與IEC 61000在結構上相關，但項目審查方可能要求IEC編號報告或逐條等效映射。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB 17625 series — China harmonic emission limits

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the OCPP version required by the charge-point operator, fleet owner, payment provider, or project owner; (2) whether the charger must support offline authorization, prepaid billing, RFID, mobile payment, or roaming; (3) that GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced by CCS2-compatible communication for IEC deployments; (4) that IEC 61000 EMC reports cover harmonic current, flicker, surge, ESD, EFT, voltage dips, radiated/conducted immunity, and any wireless functions; (5) that firmware and cloud endpoints can be supported locally in French documentation and with realistic after-sales service.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电点运营商、车队业主、支付服务商或项目业主要求的OCPP版本；(2) 充电桩是否须支持离线授权、预付费、RFID、移动支付或漫游；(3) 在IEC部署中，GB/T 27930直流通信已替换为CCS2兼容通信；(4) IEC 61000 EMC报告覆盖谐波电流、闪变、浪涌、静电放电、电快速瞬变、电压暂降、辐射/传导抗扰度以及任何无线功能；(5) 固件和云端点能够配合法语文件和现实可行的售后服务在当地支持。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電點運營商、車隊業主、支付服務商或項目業主要求的OCPP版本；(2) 充電樁是否須支持離線授權、預付費、RFID、移動支付或漫遊；(3) 在IEC部署中，GB/T 27930直流通訊已替換為CCS2兼容通訊；(4) IEC 61000 EMC報告覆蓋諧波電流、閃變、浪涌、靜電放電、電快速瞬變、電壓暫降、輻射/傳導抗擾度以及任何無線功能；(5) 韌體和雲端點能夠配合法語文件和現實可行的售後服務在當地支持。

mandatory_status.target: OCPP: mandatory where required by networked-charger project specification, charge-point operator, fleet owner, or donor/lender tender. EMC: required where IEC-aligned electrical conformity, utility acceptance, or project specification applies
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication and is not OCPP-compatible; China EMC evidence may require IEC mapping before Togo use

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Togo has no confirmed national OCPP platform, but OCPP is the practical requirement for any managed charger network. GB/T 27930 DC communication and China-only EMC reports are not enough for an IEC-aligned, networked Togo deployment without protocol redesign and IEC 61000 evidence or mapping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 多哥没有经确认的全国性OCPP平台，但OCPP是任何受管理充电网络的实际要求。若未进行协议重新设计并提供IEC 61000证据或映射，仅有GB/T 27930直流通信和中国EMC报告不足以支持IEC对齐的多哥联网部署。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 多哥沒有經確認的全國性OCPP平台，但OCPP是任何受管理充電網絡的實際要求。若未進行協議重新設計並提供IEC 61000證據或映射，僅有GB/T 27930直流通訊和中國EMC報告不足以支持IEC對齊的多哥聯網部署。
